item.title: Always Dump when you're at work.
item.description:
Surely more supervisors/managers will solve this problem.
Weeks? Try years. Not putting out any more fires unless someone I like is in danger.
One guy bragged to me that he never used a sick day. So... Did you just magically manage to be off those exact days, or were you coming in sick..?
Can't afford overtime? Okey-doke.
Take a Mental Health Day.
Our manager ran away with the approved days off, so management had no idea who had what approved. It was hilarious mayhem.
WHY IS ONLY ONE PERSON TRAINED ON DOING THE SCHEDULES?! Every time they have to leave, we get so fucked because someone has to learn on the fly.
Are they gone? Good. So let me tell you about this one time...
And if they catch me doing any of those, they get mad, saying we don't need to do that right now. Bitch, nobody else is going to.
If your manager likes you... Something's fucky.
A classic fix.
I prefer "Act your Wage".
They put my number on a wipe-off board in case someone needed a shift covered, and when I tried to remove it, they wrote it back and told me it had to be up there. So I switched the 3 to an 8. Fixed.
SO MUCH. My legs want me to walk faster all the time, and it's so hard to stop myself.
Yellow one should be at least 3x thicker.
Apologies for the quality, but still true.
Please punch me, I can go home early.
Work smarter, not harder.
Also they don't care for the truth anyway. They want your tongue in their butthole.
item.dc:creator: Onlyhereforthelaughs

item.title: When dad jokes leave the house
item.dc:creator: Basti2202

item.title: Convo between me and my dad got a little heated.
item.description: I don't hate America, not really. Most of the people are great, and we have some more progressive laws than other countries. We were founded on the idea that EVERYONE deserves life liberty and the pursuit of happieness; That every man is created equal and deserves to be treated equally. I love the idea that "in America, you can make it!" I do hate the politicians who have twisted this idea of America into a hateful cesspool of sexism, racism, homophobia, and any other ism you can think of. Tldr; I told my dad what I said in the meme and the description. He didn't continue the conversation
item.dc:creator: TheWonderfulWorldOfDickButt

item.title: Eruption has started again in Iceland
item.description: Beautiful and terrifying.
item.dc:creator: Zetor

item.title: The Best News of 2023!
item.description:
January - London: Girl with incurable cancer recovers after pioneering treatment. A girl’s incurable cancer has been cleared from her body after what scientists have described as the most sophisticated cell engineering to date.
February - Utah legislature unanimously passes ban on LGBTQ conversion therapy
March - First vaccine for honeybees could save billions. The United States Department of Agriculture (USDA) has approved the world’s first-ever vaccine intended to address the global decline of honeybees.
April - Fungi discovered that can eat plastic in just 140 days. Australian scientists have successfully used backyard mould to break down one of the world's most stubborn plastics — a discovery they hope could ease the burden of the global recycling crisis within years. 
May - Ocean Cleanup removes 200,000th kilogram of plastic from the Pacific Ocean. The Dutch offshore restoration project, Ocean Cleanup, says it has reached a milestone. The organization's plastic catching efforts have now fished more than 200,000 kilograms of plastic out of the Pacific Ocean
June - U.S. judge blocks Florida ban on care for trans minors in narrow ruling, says ‘gender identity is real’. A federal judge temporarily blocked portions of a new Florida law that bans transgender minors from receiving puberty blockers
July - World’s largest Phosphate deposit discovered in Norway. A massive underground deposit of high-grade phosphate rock in Norway, pitched as the world’s largest, is big enough to satisfy world demand for fertilisers, solar panels and electric car batteries over the next 50 years,
August - Successful room temperature ambient-pressure magnetic levitation of LK-99. If the claim of South Korea’s Quantum Energy Research Centre holds up, the material could usher in all sorts of technological marvels, such as perfectly efficient electrical grids.
September - World’s 1st drug to regrow teeth enters clinical trials. The ability to regrow your own teeth could be just around the corner. A team of scientists, led by a Japanese pharmaceutical startup, are getting set to start human trials on a new drug that has successfully grown new teeth in animal test subjects.
October - Nobel Prize goes to scientists behind mRNA Covid vaccines
November - No cases of cancer caused by HPV in Norwegian 25-year olds, the first cohort to be mass vaccinated for HPV.
December - President Biden announces he’s pardoning all convictions of federal marijuana possession
That's it for this year ❤️ For sources and weekly collection of good news you can subscribe to my newsletter here: https://feelgoodnews.substack.com Have a nice year ahead :)
item.dc:creator: FeelGoodNews

item.title: "O, I am slain!" -Polonious
item.description: I have been attacked by a coward! Someone took the time, to put this sticker on my car. A sticker that I can only assume they PAID ACTUAL MONEY for. I can also assume that they saw me exit my car, in my mask, and instead of speaking to me, chose to put this on my car while I was safely away. So time, effort, and expense all went into this cowardly act. But however I complain... I am devastated. DEVISTATED! I look dumb! As "shit" even! Aaaaah, was ever a man so mercilessly assailed? Goddamn Nurgle cultusts! **FP EDIT** Whaaaaa?! Twice in two days! You guys rock! Thanks for liking my brand of indignant humour! Send MOAR nudes (to your significant others and consenting strangers)!!
item.dc:creator: Wapusk

item.title: Stonington Island Antarctica
item.description:
Stonington is an old research station. The massive glacier behind it used to connect to the island, but they abandoned after the glacier receded. There's both a British and American station on this little island. (Forgive me if the captions don't line up, my phone is being a bitch.)
The wind just flattened this tower.
Abandoned tractor with a radial engine. (Corrected)
For fucks sake.
It's so clear here. These massive mountains are way over the horizon. But you can still see them.
Leopard Seal peeking his head up looking for penguins to eat.
South Polar Skua Photos https://imgur.com/gallery/wxU6idC Antarctic Terns https://imgur.com/gallery/PhQNOtB Penguins https://imgur.com/gallery/2VZ7b3r
item.dc:creator: jrpsmith

HE IS A REAL DANGER to American Democracy. He sold us out to our enemies. 8million from China, Russia n Qutar while President. ALL about POWER

item.title: Fun fact: Azog’s original design has a loin cloth made from the skinned faces of dwarves.
item.description: Fun fact: Azog’s original design has a loin cloth made from the skinned faces of dwarves. It was a bit too gruesome and was changed to cloth in the film, but this statue features the original design! #thehobbit #azog #wetaworkshop #weta #middleearth
item.dc:creator: Trudwa
